ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "stock_price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock price */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" REAL /* Trading volume of the stock */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price */,
  "dividend_amount" REAL /* Dividend amount paid out on the date */,
  "split_ratio" REAL /* Split ratio for stock splits */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the stock price data */,
  "is_validated" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the data has been validated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the stock */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the stock */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the stock */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the company is based */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Initial Public Offering date */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the stock is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technical_indicators" (
  "technical_indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technical indicator entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the technical indicator (e.g., Moving Average, RSI) */,
  "indicator_value" REAL /* Value of the technical indicator */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the technical indicator */,
  "period" INTEGER /* Period over which the indicator is calculated */,
  "is_validated" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the indicator has been validated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("technical_indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_technical_indicators_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "moving_averages" (
  "moving_average_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each moving average entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the moving average */,
  "ha_open" REAL /* Heikin Ashi Open */,
  "ha_high" REAL /* Heikin Ashi High */,
  "ha_low" REAL /* Heikin Ashi Low */,
  "ha_close" REAL /* Heikin Ashi Close */,
  "period" INTEGER /* Period over which the moving average is calculated */,
  "is_validated" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the moving average has been validated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("moving_average_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moving_averages_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, portfolio manager, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the access was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_price_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "stock_price_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock price being updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of the update */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of update (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "new_open" REAL /* New opening price after update */,
  "new_high" REAL /* New highest price after update */,
  "new_low" REAL /* New lowest price after update */,
  "new_close" REAL /* New closing price after update */,
  "new_volume" REAL /* New trading volume after update */,
  "new_adjusted_close" REAL /* New adjusted closing price after update */,
  "new_dividend_amount" REAL /* New dividend amount after update */,
  "new_split_ratio" REAL /* New split ratio after update */,
  "is_validated" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the update has been validated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_price_updates_stock_price_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_price_id") REFERENCES stock_prices ("stock_price_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validation" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation check */,
  "stock_price_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock price being validated */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date of the validation check */,
  "validation_result" TEXT /* Result of the validation check (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "validation_message" TEXT /* Message or details of the validation check */,
  "validated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the validation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validation_stock_price_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_price_id") REFERENCES stock_prices ("stock_price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validation_validated_by FOREIGN KEY ("validated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
